creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Eric van Gyzen from comment #16)
> Since I have a commit bit now, I should take responsibility for the commit.

Thanks!

> Garrett and Conrad:  Do you have a working Tahi test rig?  I have the pieces of
> one, but I haven't used it for a while, so it has probably bitrotted.  If you
> don't have one, I'll try to resurrect mine and run the Neighbor Discovery
> section [at least] on head.

We don't (or at least I don't) personally, but someone at Isilon has one, I guess.

"""
Unit Test:
Ran Tahi Secion2 ND for test 169 to 175 covering Onlink redirection
"""

(Internally this is ISLN #153854 / was RB #38070; just tagging for my own future reference.)
